---
title: "Nephrology conference"
---

## Illustration
::: {.custom-figure}
![Kidney.](images/nephrology-conference/kidney.svg){#fig-bloqueada}
:::

## Use case: Conference branding
Fictional data. 

::: {.custom-figure-2}
![Event promotion.](images/nephrology-conference/event_promotion.svg){#fig-bloqueada}
:::
